title: Smart AI routing explained
summary: IBM Technology highlights a shift in AI labs from maximizing model size to implementing smart routing strategies. The approach prioritizes cost efficiency and trustworthiness by intelligently directing tasks across different models rather than defaulting to the largest available model.
writeup: IBM Technology explains smart AI routing, a shift among AI labs away from maximizing model size toward directing tasks across different models. The approach intelligently matches each task to an appropriate model rather than defaulting to the largest one available. The stated payoffs are cost efficiency and trustworthiness, making model routing a lever for cost management.
